scripts.lint: eslint scripts tests eslint.config.mjs && turbo run lint
scripts.docs:check: turbo run build --filter=@dnd-ai/contracts && node scripts/generate-contracts.mjs --check && node scripts/check-docs.mjs && node scripts/check-task-graph.mjs
scripts.config:check: corepack pnpm@11.13.0 config:check:api && corepack pnpm@11.13.0 config:check:worker && corepack pnpm@11.13.0 config:check:migration
scripts.config:check:api: turbo run build --filter=@dnd-ai/config && node --env-file=apps/api/.env.local packages/config/dist/cli.js api
scripts.config:check:worker: turbo run build --filter=@dnd-ai/config && node --env-file=apps/worker/.env.local packages/config/dist/cli.js worker
scripts.config:check:migration: turbo run build --filter=@dnd-ai/config && node --env-file=packages/persistence/.env.local packages/config/dist/cli.js migration
scripts.db:migrate: turbo run build --filter=@dnd-ai/config --filter=@dnd-ai/persistence && node scripts/run-database-migrations.mjs up
scripts.db:migrate:status: turbo run build --filter=@dnd-ai/config --filter=@dnd-ai/persistence && node scripts/run-database-migrations.mjs status
scripts.db:migrate:local: turbo run build --filter=@dnd-ai/config --filter=@dnd-ai/persistence && node --env-file=packages/persistence/.env.local scripts/run-database-migrations.mjs up
scripts.db:migrate:status:local: turbo run build --filter=@dnd-ai/config --filter=@dnd-ai/persistence && node --env-file=packages/persistence/.env.local scripts/run-database-migrations.mjs status
scripts.db:rollback:local: turbo run build --filter=@dnd-ai/config --filter=@dnd-ai/persistence && node --env-file=packages/persistence/.env.local scripts/run-database-migrations.mjs down --confirm-local-rollback
scripts.flags:status: turbo run build --filter=@dnd-ai/config --filter=@dnd-ai/persistence && node scripts/manage-feature-flag.mjs status
scripts.flags:set: turbo run build --filter=@dnd-ai/config --filter=@dnd-ai/persistence && node scripts/manage-feature-flag.mjs set
scripts.verify:docs: git diff --check HEAD && turbo run build --filter=@dnd-ai/contracts && node scripts/generate-contracts.mjs --check && node scripts/check-docs.mjs && node scripts/check-task-graph.mjs && node scripts/scan-secrets.mjs
scripts.verify:affected: git diff --check HEAD && eslint scripts tests eslint.config.mjs && node scripts/verify-affected.mjs && node scripts/check-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/check-task-graph.mjs && node scripts/scan-secrets.mjs
scripts.verify: prettier --check ".github/**/*.{yml,yaml}" "infra/**/*.{json,yml,yaml}" "scripts/**/*.mjs" "tests/**/*.mjs" "*.{json,mjs,yaml,yml}" "apps/**/*.{json,mjs,ts,tsx}" "packages/**/*.{json,ts,tsx}" && eslint scripts tests eslint.config.mjs && eslint scripts apps packages --max-warnings 0 && turbo run lint && turbo run typecheck && turbo run build && node scripts/generate-contracts.mjs --check && node scripts/run-tests.mjs all && node scripts/prepare-test-reports.mjs --required=unit,integration,database,contract,security && node scripts/verify-test-reports.mjs --required=unit,integration,database,contract,security && node scripts/check-boundaries.mjs && node scripts/check-docs.mjs && node scripts/check-task-graph.mjs && node scripts/check-ci-workflow.mjs && node scripts/check-deployment-foundation.mjs && node scripts/scan-secrets.mjs && node scripts/create-build-artifact.mjs && node scripts/verify-build-artifact.mjs
